controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (regional rural banks - digital banking channels authorisation) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
Short Title and Commencement
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks -
Digital Banking Channels Authorisation) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (regional rural banks - digital banking channels authorisation) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into effect from january 01, 2026
controls.control_description:
Effective Date
These Directions shall come into effect from January 01, 2026.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into effect from january 01, 2026

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to regional rural banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')
controls.control_description:
Applicability
The provisions of these Directions shall be applicable to Regional Rural Banks
(hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank').
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to regional rural banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable:
controls.control_description:
4.1 In these Directions, unless the context otherwise requires, the following definitions
shall be applicable:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable:

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949 or the reserve bank of india act, 1934 and rules / regulati
controls.control_description:
4.2 All other expressions unless defined herein shall have the same meaning as have
been assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 or the Reserve Bank
of India Act, 1934 and rules / regulations made thereunder, or any statutory
modification or re-enactment thereto, or Glossary of terms published by the Reserve
Bank or as used in commercial parlance, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949 or the reserve bank of india act, 1934 and rules / regulati

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place comprehensive policy(ies) for all digital banking channels keeping in account all statutory and regulatory requirements (including on man
controls.control_description:
Policies and Procedures
Banks shall put in place comprehensive policy(ies) for all digital banking channels
keeping in account all statutory and regulatory requirements (including on
management of liquidity and operational risks in digital banking scenario).
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to put in place comprehensive policy(ies) for all digital banking channels keeping in account all statutory and regulatory requirements (including on man

controls.control_objective: To ensure intimate the department of regulation, reserve bank of india (through the pravaah portal) along with a copy of the 'gap assessment and internal contro
controls.control_description:
6.2 The banks commencing view only digital banking channel(s), from date of
applicability of these Directions, shall intimate the Department of Regulation, Reserve
Bank of India (through the PRAVAAH portal) along with a copy of the 'Gap Assessment
and Internal Controls Adequacy' (GAICA) report as prescribed in para 7.1(e)(i) below
within thirty days from the decision to launch the facility with the approval of bank
board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to intimate the department of regulation, reserve bank of india (through the pravaah portal) along with a copy of the 'gap assessment and internal contro

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be forwarded to national bank for agriculture and rural development (nabard)
controls.control_description:
A copy of the submission to the Reserve Bank shall also be forwarded to
National Bank for Agriculture and Rural Development (NABARD).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be forwarded to national bank for agriculture and rural development (nabard)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to scrutiny as deemed fit by the supervisors
controls.control_description:
The process shall
be subject to scrutiny as deemed fit by the supervisors.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to scrutiny as deemed fit by the supervisors

controls.control_objective: To ensure require prior approval of the reserve bank for launching transactional banking facility
controls.control_description:
7.1 Banks shall require prior approval of the Reserve Bank for launching transactional
banking facility.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require prior approval of the reserve bank for launching transactional banking facility

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to the department of regulation, reserve bank of india (through the pravaah portal) for launch of transactional banking facility, along with the
controls.control_description:
Subject to fulfilment of the eligibility criteria as enumerated below,
banks may apply to the Department of Regulation, Reserve Bank of India (through the
PRAVAAH portal) for launch of transactional banking facility, along with the approval
of bank board and other necessary supporting documents.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to the department of regulation, reserve bank of india (through the pravaah portal) for launch of transactional banking facility, along with the

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit detailed report indicating the expected expenditure (on set up, maintenance, and upgradation) along with availability of funds for offering the
controls.control_description:
The
applicant bank shall submit detailed report indicating the expected expenditure (on
set up, maintenance, and upgradation) along with availability of funds for offering
the proposed facility on an ongoing basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit detailed report indicating the expected expenditure (on set up, maintenance, and upgradation) along with availability of funds for offering the

controls.control_objective: To ensure also include the details of cost-benefit analysis, third-party technology service providers (if any), technology proposed to be adopted, and availabil
controls.control_description:
Further, the report shall also include the
details of cost-benefit analysis, third-party technology service providers (if any),
technology proposed to be adopted, and availability of skilled personnel to manage
the operations / oversee the outsourcing partners' operations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also include the details of cost-benefit analysis, third-party technology service providers (if any), technology proposed to be adopted, and availabil

controls.control_objective: To ensure be assessed through the following: i
controls.control_description:
This shall be assessed through the
following:
i.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be assessed through the following: i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be certified by (third party) cert-in empaneled auditor(s)
controls.control_description:
The report shall be certified by (third party) CERT-In
empaneled auditor(s).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be certified by (third party) cert-in empaneled auditor(s)

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure compliance to the eligibility criteria as detailed in para 7
controls.control_description:
If a bank had received approval for a particular digital
banking channel (like mobile banking) before the date of applicability of these
Directions, it shall ensure compliance to the eligibility criteria as detailed in para 7.1(a)
to (d) above before launching any other digital banking channel.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure compliance to the eligibility criteria as detailed in para 7

controls.control_objective: To ensure be sent to the department of regulation, reserve bank of india (through the pravaah portal) with the approval of bank board within thirty days from th
controls.control_description:
Further, the GAICA
Report, certified by (third party) CERT-In empanelled auditor(s), addressing the
specific requirement for the new proposed channels shall be sent to the Department
of Regulation, Reserve Bank of India (through the PRAVAAH portal) with the approval
of bank board within thirty days from the decision to launch the facility.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be sent to the department of regulation, reserve bank of india (through the pravaah portal) with the approval of bank board within thirty days from th

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be forwarded to nabard
controls.control_description:
A copy of the
submission to the Reserve Bank shall also be forwarded to NABARD.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be forwarded to nabard

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to scrutiny as deemed fit by the supervisors
controls.control_description:
The process
shall be subject to scrutiny as deemed fit by the supervisors.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to scrutiny as deemed fit by the supervisors

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable for banks offering digital banking services
controls.control_description:
The following instructions shall be applicable for banks offering digital banking
services.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable for banks offering digital banking services

controls.control_objective: To ensure also ensure compliance with reporting requirements as prescribed by nabard
controls.control_description:
The banks shall also ensure compliance with reporting requirements as
prescribed by NABARD.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also ensure compliance with reporting requirements as prescribed by nabard

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the directions contained in this chapter on a continuous basis
controls.control_description:
Chapter IV - General Guidelines
All banks offering digital banking services, regardless of type of facility, shall comply
with the directions contained in this chapter on a continuous basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the directions contained in this chapter on a continuous basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure continuous adherence to the following in conduct of their digital banking operations:
controls.control_description:
Compliance
Banks shall ensure continuous adherence to the following in conduct of their digital
banking operations:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure continuous adherence to the following in conduct of their digital banking operations:

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain explicit consent from the customer for registering/de- registering (in case of existing customers) for digital banking services and the consent
controls.control_description:
10.1 Banks shall obtain explicit consent from the customer for registering/de-
registering (in case of existing customers) for digital banking services and the consent
shall be duly recorded/documented.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain explicit consent from the customer for registering/de- registering (in case of existing customers) for digital banking services and the consent

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be clearly indicated that sms/email alerts will be sent to the mobile number/email of the customer registered with the bank for operations, both
controls.control_description:
It shall also be clearly indicated that SMS/email
alerts will be sent to the mobile number/email of the customer registered with the bank
for operations, both financial and non-financial, in their account(s).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be clearly indicated that sms/email alerts will be sent to the mobile number/email of the customer registered with the bank for operations, both

controls.control_objective: To ensure be provided to minimize the need for branch visits and application processing time
controls.control_description:
10.2 Multiple channels for registration of these services may be provided to minimize
the need for branch visits and application processing time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be provided to minimize the need for branch visits and application processing time

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide the terms and conditions in clear and simple language (preferably in english, hindi, and the local language) which is easily comprehensible to
controls.control_description:
10.3 For registration, banks shall provide the terms and conditions in clear and simple
language (preferably in English, Hindi, and the local language) which is easily
comprehensible to the customer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide the terms and conditions in clear and simple language (preferably in english, hindi, and the local language) which is easily comprehensible to

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide details of charges (if any) to be levied under specific circumstances, timeframe and process to initiate stop-payment instructions, helpdesk d
controls.control_description:
These shall provide details of charges (if any) to be
levied under specific circumstances, timeframe and process to initiate stop-payment
instructions, helpdesk details, grievance redressal, and risks, responsibilities, and
liabilities of customers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide details of charges (if any) to be levied under specific circumstances, timeframe and process to initiate stop-payment instructions, helpdesk d

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the guidelines on customer protection including limiting of liability in unauthorised electronic banking transactions as provided in reser
controls.control_description:
10.4 Banks shall comply with the guidelines on customer protection including limiting
of liability in unauthorised electronic banking transactions as provided in Reserve Bank
of India (Regional Rural Banks - Responsible Business Conduct) Directions, 2025 (as
amended from time to time), sending of alerts (through SMS, email, etc.), and ensure
that the terms and conditions provided to customers are compliant with the
instructions.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to comply with the guidelines on customer protection including limiting of liability in unauthorised electronic banking transactions as provided in reser

controls.control_objective: To ensure make it mandatory for the customer to opt for any digital banking channel to avail any other banking facility like debit cards
controls.control_description:
10.5 Banks shall not make it mandatory for the customer to opt for any digital banking
channel to avail any other banking facility like debit cards.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make it mandatory for the customer to opt for any digital banking channel to avail any other banking facility like debit cards

controls.control_objective: To ensure be no compulsory bundling of services by the bank
controls.control_description:
Customers can avail, if they
so desire, one or more services under digital banking channels, however, there shall
be no compulsory bundling of services by the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be no compulsory bundling of services by the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure lie solely with the customer
controls.control_description:
The choice to avail any digital
banking facility shall lie solely with the customer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to lie solely with the customer

controls.control_objective: To ensure be network independent
controls.control_description:
10.6 Banks offering mobile banking service (other than through mobile applications)
must ensure that customers across mobile network operators can avail of the service,
i.e., the service shall be network independent.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be network independent

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place appropriate risk mitigation measures in accordance with their policies like transaction limit (per transaction, daily, weekly, monthly)
controls.control_description:
10.7 Banks shall put in place appropriate risk mitigation measures in accordance with
their policies like transaction limit (per transaction, daily, weekly, monthly), transaction
velocity limit, fraud checks, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to put in place appropriate risk mitigation measures in accordance with their policies like transaction limit (per transaction, daily, weekly, monthly)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable
controls.control_description:
It is clarified that
wherever specific requirements have been prescribed by the Reserve Bank or
respective payment system operators through which the transaction is routed or
switched (for example, NPCI, Card networks like VISA, Mastercard, etc.), the
requirements that are stricter of the two shall be applicable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure <image> continuous compliance with instructions issued by the reserve bank in this regard as amended from time to time
controls.control_description:
Banks shall ensure
<image>
continuous compliance with instructions issued by the Reserve Bank in this regard as
amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure <image> continuous compliance with instructions issued by the reserve bank in this regard as amended from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure be displayed on banks' digital banking channels except as specifically permitted by the reserve bank from time to time in terms of applicable instruct
controls.control_description:
10.8 Post customer login, third-party products and services, shall not be displayed on
banks' digital banking channels except as specifically permitted by the Reserve Bank
from time to time in terms of applicable instructions contained in Reserve Bank of India
(Regional Rural Banks - Branch Authorisation) Directions, 2025 and other related
instructions, as amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be displayed on banks' digital banking channels except as specifically permitted by the reserve bank from time to time in terms of applicable instruct

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The directions, instructions, and guidelines repealed prior to the issuance of
these Directions shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
12.2 Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to
be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted
under these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.control_description:
Further,
the repeal of these directions, instructions, or guidelines shall not in any way
prejudicially affect:
(1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and
any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted, continued,
or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if
those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
Application of other laws not barred
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of the
provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in
force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
Interpretations
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in
respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of these
Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding
